---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation
What problem does this solve? Who benefits from it?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like it to work. Include mockups or examples if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've considered and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional Context
Any other context, references, or screenshots.
